purpose: Candidate Godot-coordinate source geometry for an Area 01 side-view map pipeline: open surface water over a continuous seafloor with cave holes, explicit terrain polygons, sprite/object placements, collision roles, and scene hooks. This is not wired into the playable Main scene yet.

geometry_revision.reason: The prior candidate proved the sprite pipeline but kept too many rectangular shelf-box silhouettes. This pass keeps the same topology and cave-mouth ownership while revising solid terrain into larger irregular reef polygons before any runtime wiring.
repeatable_steps: Start from the authoritative source map and identify solid masses, playable water lanes, cave mouths, and hooks.
Author foreground solid masses as explicit polygons in Godot-like coordinates; do not infer them from pixels.
Keep cave-mouth centers open and represent locks or hazards as separate scene hooks.
Render a planning preview by clipping terrain fill and edge trims to these polygons.
Only after review, generate Godot Polygon2D, StaticBody2D/CollisionPolygon2D, Sprite2D trims, and Area2D hooks from the same geometry data.
geometry_revision.runtime_policy: planning-only; area_01_blockout_source_map_v1.json remains the current runtime collision authority until explicit promotion

coordinate_space.origin: Area 01 planning world coordinates; y increases downward; surface water starts near y=0.
coordinate_space.conversion: Hand-authored from docs/planning/maps/area_01_surface_floor_source_map_v1.png topology into Godot-like world coordinates. Do not infer collision from source PNG pixels.
coordinate_space.runtime_authority: planning-only candidate; docs/planning/maps/area_01_blockout_source_map_v1.json remains current runtime collision authority until this file is promoted.

pipeline.runtime_object_model: platform_objects plus interactive_scene_objects plus foreground_occluders plus scene_hooks

representation.solid_collision: StaticBody2D with CollisionPolygon2D child using the same source polygon
representation.terrain_trims: Sprite2D placements for rim strips, cave-mouth frames, props, gates, resources, and decor

topology.open_surface_rule: The full top of the level remains open water for oxygen recovery.
topology.banking_rule: Ship/moonpool offload is a separate hook from oxygen surface refill.
topology.seafloor_rule: A continuous seafloor shelf sits under open water, with visible cave mouths cut through it.
topology.route_rule: Route complexity lives below the seafloor through named cave regions with depth, hazard, gate, resource, and return-current support.

regions.role: Free horizontal surface band for oxygen recovery and choosing the next dive hole.
Readable terrain horizon below open ocean; cave mouths cut through it.
Small safe cave under the ship-side seafloor for first resources and fast turnaround.
First wider resource/banking route that teaches cargo return pressure.
Deeper vertical route with return-current support and higher-value materials.
Right-side medium branch with wreck promise and pressure gate.
Deepest locked exit that hints at later route expansion.

solid_terrain.role: Left continuous seafloor segment framing starter and shell routes.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Polygon2D reef fill plus top rim strip and sparse kelp/coral Sprite2D placements
solid_terrain.rim_strategy: Sprite2D/Polygon2D cyan lip along upper playable edge

solid_terrain.role: Seafloor lip left of the ship moonpool and starter hole.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Polygon2D reef fill plus moonpool-adjacent rim
solid_terrain.rim_strategy: Readable edge band around moonpool approach

solid_terrain.role: Seafloor lip right of the starter hole leading toward Shell Reef.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Polygon2D reef fill plus top rim strip
solid_terrain.rim_strategy: Cyan lip on playable top and cave-entry underside

solid_terrain.role: Central seafloor segment between Shell Reef and pressure routes.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Polygon2D reef fill plus sparse crystals and rim strips
solid_terrain.rim_strategy: Thin cyan lip on top/underside playable edges

solid_terrain.role: Right seafloor segment above pressure wreck branch.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Polygon2D reef fill plus top rim and right-branch mouth frame
solid_terrain.rim_strategy: Rim trims around the pressure wreck hole

solid_terrain.role: Left wall/floor of starter kelp hole.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Polygon2D cave wall fill with kelp decor Sprite2D placements
solid_terrain.rim_strategy: Cave-mouth trim where it borders playable water

solid_terrain.role: Terrain divider between starter hole and Shell Reef bank cave.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Polygon2D cave wall fill with strong entry rim
solid_terrain.rim_strategy: Rim strips along starter and Shell Reef openings

solid_terrain.role: Small navigational shelves inside Shell Reef bank cave.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Narrow ledge strip with edge trim; collision matches polygon
solid_terrain.rim_strategy: Top lip strip; no hidden blocker past visual edge

solid_terrain.role: Floor mass around thermal vent pocket.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Warm vent floor reef fill, vent props remain separate Sprite2D placements

solid_terrain.role: West wall framing deeper Blue Chimney descent.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Tall cave wall fill with vertical rim strips
solid_terrain.rim_strategy: Vertical cave rim toward playable descent

solid_terrain.role: Lower Blue Chimney floor and future exit approach.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Deep floor fill with darker underside and mineral Sprite2D placements

solid_terrain.role: Right branch wall enclosing the pressure wreck pocket.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Cave wall fill with wreck chunks and pressure gate as separate Sprite2D placements
solid_terrain.rim_strategy: Cave mouth and locked-route rim trims

solid_terrain.role: Lower-right future route floor around locked exit.
solid_terrain.visual_strategy: Quiet locked-route floor fill; locked gate stays separate

cave_mouths.readability_role: Visible first opening under the ship-side seafloor.
cave_mouths.collision_rule: No blocking collision across the center of this entrance.

cave_mouths.readability_role: Second hole into the wider Shell Reef banking route.
cave_mouths.collision_rule: No blocking collision across the entrance center.

cave_mouths.readability_role: Central drop into the vent pocket.
cave_mouths.collision_rule: Collision frames the drop; center remains navigable.

cave_mouths.readability_role: Deeper vertical route from Shell Reef toward Blue Chimney.
cave_mouths.collision_rule: No hidden wall across descent center.

cave_mouths.readability_role: Right-side opening toward pressure wreck branch.
cave_mouths.collision_rule: Gate collision belongs to the pressure gate hook, not the terrain hole.
Future lock is explicit gate hook, not inferred terrain collision.

camera_bounds.notes: Use camera-scale previews to verify wall readability before promotion to Main.tscn.

validation_rules: Open surface spans the full top of the map and is not blocked by terrain collision.
Ship offload zone is separate from oxygen refill zone.
Every solid terrain entry has Polygon2D visual, CollisionPolygon2D collision, and rim/lip strategy.
Every cave mouth has a matching cave_entrance scene hook and no blocker across the entrance center.
Current pickup and scan zones sit inside reachable planned regions.
Future locked gates are explicit Area2D/interactable hooks and must not be inferred from pixels.
Parallax backgrounds, lights, plants, crystals, and background rock do not own player-blocking collision.
This file must be promoted intentionally before it replaces area_01_blockout_source_map_v1.json as runtime authority.
